name: Enable-PSBreakpoint

options.name: -Breakpoint
options.description: Specifies the breakpoints to enable. Provide a variable containing breakpoints or a command that gets breakpoint objects, such as `Get-PSBreakpoint`. You can also pipe breakpoint objects to `Enable-PSBreakpoint`.

options.name: -Id
options.description: Specifies the Id numbers of the breakpoints to enable. The default value is all breakpoints. Provide the Id by number or in a variable. You can't pipe Id numbers to `Enable-PSBreakpoint`. To find the Id of a breakpoint, use the `Get-PSBreakpoint` cmdlet.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: Returns an object representing the breakpoint being enabled. By default, this cmdlet doesn't generate any output.

name: -Runspace
-RunspaceId
options.description: Specifies the Id of a Runspace object so you can interact with breakpoints in the specified runspace.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Enables the breakpoints in the current console.
